# CRITICAL WORKSPACE REBUILD SPECIFICATION

## Current Problems

### Problem 1: Generated Files Are Not Connected To Workspace

Current Behavior:

AI generates code.

Code appears in chat.

Files are not properly added to project storage.

Workspace remains empty.

Result:

User cannot continue working.

User loses generated output.

---

Required Behavior:

Every generated file must automatically become a project asset.

When AI generates:

* index.html
* app.js
* style.css
* docker-compose.yml
* main.py

Those files must immediately appear in:

Files Tab
Explorer
Project Storage

without requiring refresh.

The AI should never generate files that only exist in chat.

All generated files must be persisted.

---

### Problem 2: Cannot Continue Development

Current Behavior:

AI builds project.

Build finishes.

Conversation effectively ends.

User cannot evolve project.

---

Required Behavior:

Projects are living workspaces.

Example:

User:

Build an invoicing SaaS.

AI builds.

User:

Add Stripe integration.

AI updates existing files.

User:

Create admin dashboard.

AI modifies project.

User:

Convert frontend to Next.js.

AI performs migration.

Every prompt should modify the existing project.

Not create a new project.

---

### Problem 3: Workspace Clears On Refresh

Current Behavior:

Refresh page.

Workspace resets.

Project disappears.

---

Required Behavior:

All project state must be stored.

Persist:

* Chat history
* Generated files
* Build versions
* Deployments
* Logs
* Preview state

Refreshing page should restore project exactly where user left off.

Workspace state must survive:

* refresh
* logout/login
* browser restart

---

### Problem 4: Preview Is Broken

Current Behavior:

HTML loads.

CSS missing.

JavaScript missing.

Assets broken.

Preview shows raw HTML.

---

Required Behavior:

Preview must render complete application.

When preview loads:

Resolve:

* CSS files
* JavaScript files
* Images
* Fonts
* Assets

Serve generated project from isolated runtime.

Preview must behave exactly like deployed application.

---

### Problem 5: Upload Files Missing

Current Behavior:

Cannot upload code.

Cannot upload ZIP.

Cannot upload project.

AI cannot analyze existing projects.

---

Required Behavior:

Workspace must support:

Upload Files

Upload Folder

Upload ZIP

Git Repository Import

GitHub Repository Import

Drag and Drop

AI should then:

Read files.

Analyze architecture.

Suggest improvements.

Fix bugs.

Refactor.

Deploy.

Generate documentation.

Create automations.

---

### Problem 6: File Downloads Are Wrong

Current Behavior:

Single file downloads only.

---

Required Behavior:

Files tab must include:

Download File

Download Folder

Download Project ZIP

Export Project

Clone Repository

Every project should automatically generate:

project.zip

after every successful build.

---

### Problem 7: Publish Uses Wrong Project

Current Behavior:

Publish loads old projects.

Deployment references wrong builds.

---

Required Behavior:

Publish must deploy:

Current Project

Current Version

Current Files

Current Build

Never historical projects unless explicitly selected.

Publish button must always reference active project ID.

---

### Problem 8: AI Cannot SSH

Current Behavior:

AI claims SSH support.

Cannot actually access servers.

---

Required Behavior:

Server Connections Module.

Users connect:

Host

Port

Username

SSH Key

Password

Stored in Secrets Vault.

AI can:

View Logs

Deploy

Restart Services

Run Commands

Update Containers

Install Packages

Execute Scripts

After user approval.

---

# Workspace Redesign

Tabs:

Chat

Files

Preview

Deploy

Logs

History

Servers

Secrets

---

# Chat Tab Redesign

Current chat is weak.

Replace with:

Conversation + Build System.

---

AI should show:

Analyzing Requirements

Planning Architecture

Generating Backend

Generating Frontend

Creating Database

Generating Docker Config

Building Preview

Packaging ZIP

Deployment Ready

---

Each step visible live.

---

# Chat Actions

Every AI response should support:

Apply Changes

View Files

Open Preview

Download ZIP

Deploy

Rollback

Continue Building

---

# Files Tab Redesign

Explorer must behave like VS Code.

Support:

Create

Rename

Delete

Move

Upload

Download

ZIP Export

Folder Download

Search

Multi-select

Drag & Drop

---

# Preview Tab Redesign

Preview should render actual application.

Not raw HTML.

Support:

HTML

React

Next.js

Vue

Laravel

Django

Flask

FastAPI

Static Sites

Dashboards

Admin Panels

---

# Deploy Tab Redesign

Display:

Current Build

Build Status

Deployment Targets

Deployment History

Deployment Logs

Domains

SSL

Environment Variables

---

Actions:

Deploy

Redeploy

Rollback

Publish

Stop

Delete

---

# History Tab

Every AI change becomes version.

Example:

Version 1

Initial Build

Version 2

Added Payments

Version 3

Added Dashboard

Version 4

Refactored Backend

---

User can:

Restore

Compare

Download

Deploy

---

# Build Persistence

Every build creates:

Project Record

Version Record

ZIP Archive

Preview Snapshot

Deployment Snapshot

Chat Snapshot

Nothing should be lost.

---

# Success Criteria

A user should be able to:

1. Build project.
2. Refresh browser.
3. Return tomorrow.
4. Continue same conversation.
5. Modify project.
6. Upload files.
7. Download ZIP.
8. Preview correctly.
9. Deploy current version.
10. SSH into connected servers.
11. Publish applications.
12. View version history.

without losing any project data.
